headline: Accenture Announces Reinvention Services Leadership
summary: NEW YORK, March 13, 2026--Accenture announces its new leadership team for Reinvention Services, which is led by Manish Sharma, Accenture’s Chief Strategy and Services Officer.

raw.headline: Accenture Announces Reinvention Services Leadership
raw.summary: NEW YORK, March 13, 2026--Accenture announces its new leadership team for Reinvention Services, which is led by Manish Sharma, Accenture’s Chief Strategy and Services Officer.

headline: How The Accenture (ACN) Investment Story Is Resetting Around AI Expectations And Valuation
summary: Accenture’s updated analyst fair value estimate shifts from about US$292.42 to roughly US$283.37, signaling a reset in what some models see as reasonable upside for the shares. Much of this change lines up with recent research, where many firms are trimming price targets as they reassess expectations around AI driven growth, partner spending, and what multiples investors may be willing to pay. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative could shape your own view on Accenture over...

headline: If you want a promotion at Accenture, CEO says you’ve got to use AI
summary: “If you want to get promoted, you've got to do the things that we do in order to operate Accenture,” Julie Sweet said.

headline: Accenture CEO Julie Sweet Makes AI Proficiency A Prerequisite For Promotion
summary: Accenture CEO Julie Sweet announced that AI proficiency is now required for career advancement.
